patch.value: Deepen pm-todos: todo.txt + GH task-list + validate + grouping + full field round-trip

Add todo.txt import/export, GitHub task-list export, todos validate command, --group-by sectioning, and full field round-trip (type/priority/tags/deadline/status/assignee) in markdown. Backward compatible: default markdown byte-identical.

author: codex

patch.value: All enhancements shipped: todo.txt import/export (--format todotxt), GitHub task-list export (--format tasklist), todos validate command, --group-by status|sprint|type. Default markdown kept byte-identical (verified). 26 unit tests green, typecheck clean, functionally verified end-to-end with real data incl. lossless todo.txt round-trip. Capabilities kept at [commands,schema,importers] - empirically schema is REQUIRED for command activation in this extension shape (dropping it causes Unknown command todos).

message: All enhancements shipped: todo.txt import/export (--format todotxt), GitHub task-list export (--format tasklist), todos validate command, --group-by status|sprint|type. Default markdown kept byte-identical (verified). 26 unit tests green, typecheck clean, functionally verified end-to-end with real data incl. lossless todo.txt round-trip. Capabilities kept at [commands,schema,importers] - empirically schema is REQUIRED for command activation in this extension shape (dropping it causes Unknown command todos).
